title: Explorisa
description: This modpack is centered around becoming stronger as you explore new structures, biomes, and even whole new dimensions, all the while defeating strong bosses, in a medieval/fantasy rpg setting.
body:
The focus of our modpack is becoming stronger as you explore new structures, biomes, and even whole new dimensions, all the while defeating strong bosses, in a medieval/fantsy rpg setting. This modpack is made for clientside use, but it is easily adapted for hosting a server.
Content This modpack is a collection of Rpg/fantasy themed mods, coupled with some serverside optimaztion and a lot of world/structure generation. Of course we also added better combat,skills, and magic, but the main focus is on exploration. There are some other little aditions, feel free to discover them for yourself (don't worry, they all fit in the theme).

Another major point is that this modpack was made for server/multiplayer use, so you can play together with your friends in one world. Be warned though, for hosting the server it is advisable to remove some clientside mods, as they won't be used by the server itself.
### FAQ
Who is this for? This modpack is for everyone who wants to join or host a modded server with the Explorisa modpack, anyone who just/also wants to play this modpack on his/her own, or somebody hosting a lan server also wanting the clientside QOL mods. Or all of the above!
### Disclaimers • This is the client/singleplayer pack, for hosting a server it is advisable to use the server pack linked down below. • This is a fan-made product. We are unaffiliated with Mojang or the Mod-makers.
• We are 2 school-going teenagers, so forgive us if we are slow with responding to issues
